norma-torres.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. Textbook progressive D. HEADLINE FALSE cluster: NO on Born-Alive H.R.26 (1/11/23 roll 29) → SOL Q1 FALSE; YES both RFMA votes 7/19/22 + 12/8/22 + 'Love is love' RFMA statement → BM all FALSE; bloc NO on H.R.5 Parents Bill of Rights (3/24/23 roll 161) → FCS Q1+Q2 FALSE; YES on H.R.1 For the People Act → EI Q1-Q3 FALSE; cosponsored 'Safeguarding Sanctuary Cities Act' H.R.748 + DREAM discharge → Border Q0-Q2 + Q4 FALSE; Giffords endorsed + reintroduced Multiple Firearm Sales Reporting Modernization Act → 2A Q0-Q2 + Q4 FALSE. AIPAC FALSE q3: $131K+ all-time per OpenSecrets + TrackAIPAC ≥$102K from AIPAC + Israel-lobby PACs. SOFT cross-party catch: FP Q0 TRUE (publicly stated would support Iran-strikes WPR — Article-I posture) — narrow but cited. EMILY's List + Planned Parenthood Action Fund endorsed → SOL Q4 FALSE. Catholic registry but no public Christian witness in office located. Advanced June-2-2026 top-two; faces Mike Cargile R in Nov general.

ted-lieu.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. House Democratic LEADERSHIP voter (Vice Chair) — Heritage Action lifetime ~2% — end-to-end FALSE wall across Pillar A (life/marriage/family/liberty) + election integrity + border + self-defense (EMILY/PP/HRC/Giffords endorsed). HEADLINE FALSE: NO on Born-Alive (H.R.26 roll 25 1/11/23), YES on RFMA (H.R.8404 roll 513 12/8/22), NO on H.R.5 Parents Bill of Rights (roll 169 3/24/23), NO on H.R.2 border (roll 220 5/11/23), NO on CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act (H.R.5403 roll 217 5/23/24), NO on ATF pistol-brace disapproval (H.J.Res.44 roll 257 6/13/23), YES on AWB (H.R.1808 roll 410 7/29/22), YES on BSCA (S.2938 6/24/22), YES on H.R.1 (roll 62 3/3/21), YES on Equality Act cosponsor (H.R.15), cosponsor Access to Family Building Act (no embryo protections). HEADLINE CROSS-PARTY CATCH: FP Q0 TRUE — consistent Article-I war-powers reformer as AF JAG Lt Col: YES on Yemen WPR (H.J.Res.37 roll 142 4/4/19), YES on Iran WPR (H.Con.Res.83 roll 7 1/9/20), YES on 2002 Iraq AUMF repeal (H.R.256 roll 174 6/17/21). Rare Pillar-B catch for Dem leadership. Catholic registry but no proactive public Christian witness in office located. Advanced 2026 primary; running Nov general.

sydney-kamlager-dove.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. Hard-progressive D (Heritage Action 0% current / 21% prior) — Board Co-Chair Planned Parenthood LA, sponsored CA SB 245 eliminating abortion cost-sharing, cosponsor Transgender Bill of Rights (reintroduced Feb 2026), original lead on '21st Century Children and Families Act' overriding faith-based-adoption refusals. HEADLINE FALSE cluster: SOL Q0+Q1+Q4 FALSE (PP-LA board co-chair + 'defunding PP would cause health crisis' press conference + EMILY/PP endorse); BM Q0+Q1+Q2+Q4 FALSE (Pride statements + Transgender Bill of Rights cosponsor + LGBTQ legislative leadership); FCS Q1+Q2+Q4 FALSE (Dem-bloc NO on HR5 + 21st Century Children Act overrides religious-exemption in adoption); EI Q1 FALSE HARD (voted NO on SAVE Act citizenship-proof); Border Q0+Q2 FALSE HARD (bills blocking DHS data-sharing for enforcement); 2A Q0+Q1+Q2 FALSE HARD (Giffords-endorsed, Keep Americans Safe Act 15-rd-mag-ban, NAY on H.R.1041 Veterans 2A Protection). CROSS-PARTY CATCH: FP Q0 TRUE HARD — publicly demanded War Powers vote on Trump Iran strikes + 'upset with 4 Democrats who voted against' the WPR (Article-I posture). UNDERCUT: voted YES on $95B Israel/Ukraine/Indo-Pacific supplemental + $12,500 from AIPAC + pro-Israel PACs → FP Q1+Q3 FALSE. Advanced June-2-2026 primary; faces R challenger in Nov general.

linda-sanchez.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. DISTRICT CHANGE — moved from CA-38 to CA-41 after redistricting; advanced June-2-2026 top-two primary BEHIND R Mitch Clemmons (49% vs 34.5% — competitive Nov 2026 general). Down-the-line progressive D, Heritage Action lifetime 7% / 0% current. ZERO cross-party deviations. HEADLINE FALSE: NO on Born-Alive H.R.26 (1/11/23 roll 29), YES on RFMA H.R.8404 (7/19/22 roll 373), co-introduced Equality Act, Vice Chair LGBT Equality Caucus, bloc NO on H.R.5 Parents Bill of Rights (3/24/23), lead sponsor US Citizenship Act 2021/2023, NO on Laken Riley Act H.R.29 (1/7/25), YES on Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, cosponsor H.R.8 Background Check Expansion. HEADLINE FALSE q3: $135,571 lifetime from pro-Israel PACs (AIPAC + JSTREET + NACPAC + NORPAC + PHXED + PIA + WAFI per TrackAIPAC) + addressed AIPAC National Policy Conference. HRC + Planned Parenthood + Equality California endorsed. Catholic registry but voting record contradicts Catholic teaching on life/marriage — no proactive Christian witness in office located.

mark-takano.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. Down-the-line progressive D — Heritage Action lifetime ~7% — Chair Congressional Equality Caucus (119th), first openly gay person of color in Congress. HEADLINE FALSE: NO on Born-Alive H.R.26 (1/11/23 roll 29), YES on RFMA H.R.8404 (12/8/22 roll 513), original cosponsor American Dream and Promise Act, NO on H.R.5 Parents Bill of Rights (3/24/23 roll 161), NO on H.R.2 Border (5/11/23 roll 209), YES on H.R.1 (3/3/21 roll 62), YES on H.R.8 Bipartisan Background Checks + BSCA, NO on Laken Riley Act, NO on SAVE Act, defended DoD vaccine mandate + pushed amendment to deny preferential GI-Bill treatment to vaccine refusers. CROSS-PARTY CATCHES (narrow, Pillar-B only): FP Q0 TRUE (one of 19 progressives NO on 4/20/2024 Israel supplemental — Article-I posture, though motive is progressive ceasefire-conditional not fiscal-restraint); FP Q1 TRUE (same NO on Israel supp without offsets); FP Q3 TRUE (J Street endorsed, NOT an AIPAC PAC recipient per TrackAIPAC). HRC + Planned Parenthood Action Fund 100% + Victory Fund-supported since 2012 → SOL Q4 + BM Q4 FALSE. Lead on 21st Century Children Act–style faith-based-adoption overrides → FCS Q4 FALSE. Methodist registry but no public Christian witness in office located. Advanced June-2-2026 primary; faces R Steve Manos Nov general.
